components.deleteUser.heading: Delete account
components.deleteUser.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
components.deleteUser.warningDescription: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
components.deleteUser.confirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
components.deleteUser.confirmDescription: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.
components.twoFactorRecoveryCodes.descri: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
components.twoFactorRecoveryCodes.note: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, click
components.twoFactorSetupModal.enabled.d: Two-factor authentication is now enabled. Scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app.
components.twoFactorSetupModal.verify.de: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
components.twoFactorSetupModal.setup.des: To finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app
pages.query.title: RDWAI — Ask the Dutch vehicle registry
pages.query.poweredBy: Powered by AI + RDW Open Data
pages.query.heading: Ask the Dutch vehicle registry
pages.query.description: Describe what you want to know about registered vehicles in the Netherlands.
pages.query.placeholder: e.g. How many white Volkswagen Ups from February 2017 are insured?
pages.query.shareFailed: Could not copy the share link
pages.query.errors.rateLimited: You are sending requests too quickly. Try again in a moment.
pages.query.errors.rejected: The request was rejected. Try rephrasing your question.
pages.query.errors.timeout: RDW took too long to answer this query. Please try again in a moment.
pages.query.errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please refresh the page.
pages.query.errors.server: The server encountered an error. Try again.

pages.settings.security.updatePassword.d: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure
pages.settings.security.twoFactor.enable: You will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.
pages.settings.security.twoFactor.disabl: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.
